# Developing the Future of Precision Fires & Affordable Mass: Anduril’s New Rocket Motor for the U.S. Army

Anduril selected by U.S. Army to develop a new 4.75-inch solid rocket motor, enabling up to 30 guided rockets per HIMARS pod for affordable mass precision fires.
